content.en:
Time passes.

The Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape and the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada continued to fight, and their injuries continued to worsen.

At this point, it's almost impossible to stop.

At the same time, it is said that the Nine Heavens Dao Realm on the side of the ancient city also detected the situation of the battle between the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape and the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada, and they were also discussing whether to participate.

However.

The Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm on the side of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance is not as united as the Supreme Dao Void Demon, which is also one of the weaknesses.

The Demon Gu Clan dominates the entire Supreme Dao Void Demon Clan, but the Innate Origin Domain Alliance can't do it.

If they really want to fight, they are naturally not opponents.

However, there are still a lot of Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms ready to spy from afar, and if they have the chance, they will still intervene and seize the blood of the Supreme Legend.

......

"The Supreme Dao Void Demon wants to intervene?"

Ye Tian obtained the information from the Legendary Ancient City, the number of Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons in the Legendary Realm has increased significantly, and it has already been dispatched, which is obviously for the two Legendary-level creatures with the blood of the strongest Legend.

"This group of Supreme Dao Void Demons, these two legendary-level creatures, I triggered the outbreak of battle, but they want to get involved!" Ye Tian was quite annoyed.

But.

He wouldn't underestimate the Void Demons, who had slain the strongest Legendary creatures before, not once, but many times.

Therefore, the background of the Void Demon side of the Supreme Dao should not be underestimated.

It's been another time.

The Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape and the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada had already suffered heavy losses, and although they were still fighting, they all had the idea of retreating, just to see who had the advantage and who was weak.

The weaker side will definitely choose to flee, so that the battle will end.

Ultimately.

The eight-winged golden cicada is still weaker, and its injuries are even more serious.

It doesn't want to fight anymore.

Thereupon.

The eight-winged golden cicada fled, and the speed was incomparably fast.

Although the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape has the intention to chase and kill, its own injuries are also relatively serious, and it is also afraid of being attacked and killed by other legendary-level creatures.

So, he prepared to return to his lair.

And at this moment, a group of Supreme Dao Void Demons used a special treasure to instantly cross the long territory, and its speed was much faster than Ye Tian's.

"The Void Demon of the Supreme Dao came down in an instant, what kind of treasure is this?"

Ye Tian knew that he was too late to pass, he was not as fast as the Dao Void Demons, but he was not in a hurry.

When they fight to a certain extent, they will attack and kill the Dao Void Demon side.

Originally, he wanted to take out the heavily damaged Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape and the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada, but it was not very easy, so let them continue to attack for a while.

The speed of the eight-winged golden cicada was too fast, and they were going to use a large array to trap the eight-winged golden cicada first, and then kill the ten thousand blood golden ape.

Rumble!!!!!

The eight-winged golden cicada found that the void around it had changed, and a large array instantly compressed this area together, blocking him and this piece of heaven and earth together.

Suddenly, the eight-winged golden cicada was furious.

Countless golden lights appeared on its body, attacking this large array.

Thundered!!!!!

Patches of areas were shattered, and the array was crumbling.

More than a hundred Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons were maintaining this large array, and their injuries were gradually getting worse, but they were still using various treasures to maintain this large array, waiting for the battle on the other side to end, and then come here.

......

"Directly use the big killing weapon to kill this 10,000-blooded golden ape!"

Darklin commanded.

At this time, ten Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons were ordered to activate the Great Killing Weapon Dark Blood Shuttle.

"You urge the Darkblood Shuttle, if you don't do it, the people behind you will die!" Darklin ordered.

"Lord Darklin, let's urge the Darkblood Shuttle!"

They panicked.

When it comes to the Nine Folds Dao Void Demons, who wants to die, but they have a low status, and now they are chosen, they are really unlucky, if they are not willing to obey the orders of the dark lin, they will also die, and even the clan will be slaughtered.

They believed that Darklin and the Dark Blood Demon Venerable behind him would really do this.

So, they didn't dare to disobey.

Rumble!!!!!

The ten Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons began to urge the Dark Blood Shuttle, and in an instant, the Dark Blood Shuttle erupted with a blood-colored light, piercing through the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape at a speed that surpassed all else.

The Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape's supreme legendary body couldn't bear it, and it was directly penetrated, and its body began to crumble, but the light on its body flashed, forcibly stabilizing its body that was about to collapse.

"It's worthy of being the body of the strongest legend, this is not dead!"

While Darklin was surprised, he also showed envy.

He also wants to train into the body of a supreme legend!

However, he was even more surprised by the strength of the Dark Blood Demon Venerable, a random gift of a big killing weapon could severely damage such a legendary-level creature, and its strength reached such a terrifying level, it was an existence that he was far behind.

At this time, the bodies of the ten Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons began to crumble, and under the bombardment of the Origin of the Legendary Realm, their bodies were turned into ashes by the Origin Realm.

This is the backlash of the origin of the legendary realm!

The Legends Realm does not allow the power of the Dao Realm to appear, let alone the power of the Dark Blood Demon Venerable, which is the power level of the elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

This kind of existence is enough to threaten the entire Legendary Realm, and it will naturally be counterattacked by the Origin of the Legendary Realm with all its might.

"Shoot them all and kill the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape!"

Darklin commanded.

......

Distance.

A copy of Ye Tian's body was also secretly snooping, hiding himself with the third sequence of the Perfection Realm's Supreme Dao rules, if they didn't pay attention, they would naturally not be able to discover themselves.

After all, the eyes of this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons were all on the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape.

"What kind of means was that just now, it pierced the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape with one blow, if it hits me, it will definitely kill me!" Ye Tian was very surprised by such a method, no wonder they dared to kill the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape.

However, the price to pay for such a method was too great, and it required the sacrifice of ten Ninth Supreme Dao Void Demons.

On the side of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, no force dares to use it like this.

Thundered!!!!

More than a thousand Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons besieged the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape that was on the verge of death, and the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape was not willing to wait for death, it broke out with terrifying combat power before it died.

With a punch, more than a dozen Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons were directly annihilated, and dozens of Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons were severely injured.

And these Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons still attacked with all their might, severely damaging the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape again and again.

Suddenly, the aura of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape became weaker and weaker.

Finally.

The Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape is going to die.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian made a move.

Rumble!!!!!

The dense third sequence of supreme dao rule silk threads descended, penetrating the body of a ninefold supreme dao void demon, killing them instantly.

And Ye Tian's other copy body stopped the dark lin.

In the audience, only Dark Lin has the strength to compete with him, and the others are weak chickens.

Bang!!!

Another battle broke out.

And Ye Tian's third copy body stared at the attacks of many Supreme Void Demons, and grabbed the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape.
